subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1911-11-16 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: The celestial Sun hath both its rising and its setting, and thus doth the universe know both night and day, and the season of spring [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: آفتاب جهانتاب آسمانیرا طلوع و غروبی و از این جهه کیهانرا شب و روزی موسم ربیع
subcodes.subjects: @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @cycles in the physical and spiritual worlds, @spiritual springtime, @growth of the Cause, @spiritual transformation, @literal interpretation
